project_type: Python FastAPI release orchestrator with HTMX/SSE UI
test_framework: pytest + pytest-asyncio (asyncio_mode=auto), tests in tests/ directory (flat, not nested unit/integration). Uses unittest.mock with AsyncMock for async DB mocking. conftest.py provides mock_db_session, async_client, and model factories.
verification_instructions: 1. Run uv sync to install deps. 2. Run pytest tests/ -x --ignore=tests/integration to run unit tests. 3. Integration tests require Docker/Testcontainers so skip those.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode. Python 3.11 available via pyenv. uv available. No running PostgreSQL (integration tests use Testcontainers). Alembic migrations cannot be actually run without DB.
contribution_requirements: Code follows existing patterns: FastAPI Depends() injection, SQLAlchemy async models, Pydantic v2 schemas, Jinja2 templates with HTMX. Portuguese comments/messages in code.
key_patterns:
- Repository pattern with FastAPI Depends(get_db) injection
- Services instantiated via Depends() with repo dependencies
- Background tasks: asyncio loop pattern (see timeout_checker.py) registered in lifespan (main.py)
- Alembic migrations: manual op.create_table style
- Tests: class-based with @pytest.fixture for service setup, AsyncMock for repos
- UI: Jinja2 templates with HTMX attributes (hx-post, hx-get, hx-target, hx-swap)
- Enums in schemas/enums.py as str Enum
directory_structure:
src/maestro/ - main package
  api/routes/ - FastAPI routers (orchestrator.py, callback.py, ui.py)
  schemas/ - Pydantic models and enums
  services/ - business logic + background tasks
  repositories/ - DB access layer
  database/ - SQLAlchemy models + session
  integration/ - external HTTP clients (jenkins, github)
  ui/templates/ - Jinja2 HTML templates
  config/ - settings, logger
migrations/versions/ - Alembic migration scripts
tests/ - pytest tests (flat structure)
